oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.9) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.9 (build 526) — notarized + stapled, Gatekeeper-accepted, Sparkle appcast live. Ships the subagent-busy attention-clobber fix (PR #89): hook events now carry an origin id end-to-end so a background subagent's busy/active status can no longer clobber a pending AskUserQuestion raised by the main thread.

Fixed the sidebar burying a pending prompt: Claude fires a subagent's tool hooks from the parent's process under the same pane id, so a background subagent's PostToolUse (busy) clobbered the main thread's AskUserQuestion (needs_attention) seconds later. Hook events now carry their origin (payload agent_id, empty == main thread) through tian-hook-log.sh -> `tian status set --agent-id` -> IPC, and a pane records the attention owner that raised a needs_attention: only that origin's busy/active may clear it. Build + 1122 tianTests + 3 hook shell suites green.
Released v1.5.8 (build 517) — notarized + stapled, Sparkle appcast live. Ships the overview selected-card glow-clip fix (PR #88) and the skill-install scoping fix (PR #87).
